title: Afrobeat & Caribbean Vibes Night
location: Tago Life Center, 892 Jefferson St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: Dance to infectious Afrobeat and Caribbean rhythms. Perfect date night energy with island vibes, great music, and a lively atmosphere. Occurs every Friday in June.

title: LINES OF PLAY | Group Art Exhibition (30+ Artists)
description: Celebration of World Cup art with 30+ artists. Great way to spark conversation while exploring diverse artistic expressions. Casual, creative atmosphere perfect for couples.

title: Saturday Night Live Comedy: GEMINI TAKEOVER
description: Hosted by WeightBall with headliner Ambrose Jones. 2 hours of laughs at Atlanta's Original Uptown Comedy Corner. Doors at 7:45 PM. Great for couples who love to laugh together.

title: Sun Havana Nights: Salsa Bachata & Latin Dancing
description: Every Sunday salsa ATL brings Havana Nights with salsa, bachata, and Latin dancing. Perfect for couples who want to learn together or show off their moves. Great energy, food, and vibes.

title: Atlanta Comedy Experience
description: Sunday night comedy show. Good for a relaxed date with laughs. Virtual studio setting ensures a quality experience.

title: Jazz on the Rooftop – Tuesday Nights
description: Weekly rooftop jazz with Atlanta's skyline as your backdrop. Perfect for a sophisticated date night. Midweek escape with live music and good vibes. Also June 16.

title: Tropical Latin Night Atlanta
description: Weekend kickoff with tropical Latin vibes. Dance the night away with bachata, salsa, and merengue. Great for couples who love to move. Also June 19.

title: Queer Games: Videogame Exhibition
description: Videogame exhibition celebrating queer gaming culture. Interactive and conversation-starting. Runs through June 14. Great for couples who game together or want to try something different.

title: Art of the Game: Open Reception
description: Opening reception exploring art of gaming. Sophisticated gallery setting perfect for cultured couples. Wine, conversation, and creative inspiration.

title: Live Jazz Fridays: Spring Sessions
description: Juneteenth Friday Jazz at the High Museum. Combines live music with world-class art viewing. Perfect cultural date experience. Also June 19 & 26.

title: Salsa Dancing Class & Taco Dinner
description: Learn salsa basics then enjoy tacos. Low-pressure way to learn together as a couple. Interactive, fun, and ends with dinner. Perfect for date night.
